tests.name: [PAS-XXX] User Enter master password and see Select a Vault screen

[PAS-XXX] User can see QR code and vault key in Add Device popup
[PAS-XXX] User can see validation warning when trying to create folder without title
[PAS-XXX] User can enter folder title in Create new folder page
